description: Lightweight Telegram bot service on Bun and Cloudflare Workers
assumptions: The repository currently has no application source files or package manifest.
Implementation will target Cloudflare Workers with webhook-only Telegram integration.
No database, admin UI, or multi-bot support is in scope.

tasks.title: Project foundation and runtime scaffold
tasks.description: Create the Bun/Workers project skeleton, manifest, and baseline source layout.

tasks.title: Telegram webhook intake
tasks.description: Implement POST /webhook, validate the secret header, and parse Telegram updates safely.

tasks.title: Bot response and health endpoint
tasks.description: Return a valid Telegram response payload and expose GET /health for service checks.

tasks.title: Cloudflare deployment configuration
tasks.description: Add the deployment settings and environment variable definitions needed for Workers and Telegram integration.

tasks.title: Verification and quality pass
tasks.description: Add tests where practical and run build, lint, and deployment checks against the implemented worker.

tasks.title: Implementation review
tasks.description: Review the finished work for correctness, webhook behavior, and alignment with the PRD.

expectedChecks: unit or integration tests for webhook handling

delivery.note: Run the roadmap in dependency order; the first implementation batch can be parallelized after the foundation task.
